use_cases: Displaying product images with consistent aspect ratio containers in e-commerce listings
Creating responsive image containers that maintain proportions across devices
Building gallery layouts where uniform image sizing is required
ai_summary: A minimal React wrapper around Radix UI's AspectRatio primitive, re-exported for use as a product image card container. This atomic component enforces consistent aspect ratios for images, commonly used in e-commerce product grids and media galleries. Provides responsive image containers that scale proportionally across different screen sizes without additional styling or interactions.
